detail: Gate 6 post-apply validation failed: new BLOCK rule FW-2026-04-10-TEMP caused expected allowed traffic to be dropped (ICMP ping from 192.168.1.100 to 192.168.1.1 timed out after 3 retries, expected success). Rollback invoked via 'iptables -D'; rule successfully removed and verified absent via 'iptables -C'.
